name: Rafael Microelectronics, Inc.
summary: Rafael Microelectronics, Inc. manufactures and sells radio frequency (RF) integrated circuits. It offers IoT connectivity products, terrestrial/cable/satellite set-top box receivers, satellite broadcast reception and distribution systems, optical communication systems, and TV receivers, as well as provides RF IP and design services. The company offers its products in Taiwan, Europe, North America, China, Korea and Japan. Rafael Microelectronics, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.
